page.title: Agent workspaces
page.description: Manage Agent Home definitions and open the files isolated to your account.
page.createDescription: The initial AGENTS.md template is used only when this workspace is first opened for your account.
page.listDescription: Shared and private definitions both open your own isolated Agent Home files.
page.homeDescription: Browse and edit this workspace's authoritative long-term files.

personal.title: Agent workspaces
personal.summary: Manage your Agent Home definitions and open the files isolated to your account.
personal.ownedSummary: Your active and inactive definitions. Files remain isolated to your account.
personal.sharedSummary: Shared definitions open a separate Agent Home instance for your account.

global.title: Global workspaces
global.summary: Manage definitions available to every user. Each user still receives an isolated file instance.
global.listSummary: Changing the initial template never overwrites AGENTS.md files that users already initialized.

form.name: Name
form.initialAgentsMdHint: This template is used only when your instance is initialized for the first time. It never overwrites an existing AGENTS.md.
form.initialAgentsMdHintGlobal: Changes affect only users who initialize this workspace for the first time in the future. Existing AGENTS.md files are never overwritten.
form.nameTaken: A workspace with this name already exists.

browser.selectFile: Select a file to open it.
browser.agentsMdProtected: The root AGENTS.md manages this Agent Home and cannot be deleted.

editor.conflict: This file changed since you opened it. Your draft is preserved.
editor.reloadError: Could not reload the file. Your draft is preserved.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete the workspace definition "{{name}}"? Stored user files are not automatically deleted.

errors.statusFailed: Could not change the workspace status.
errors.resourceInUse: This workspace is still referenced by an active Agent.
errors.accessDenied: You do not have access to this workspace.
errors.workspaceUnavailable: This Agent Home is temporarily unavailable.
errors.workspaceConflict: The file changed. Reload it before saving again.
